// About Me

Building full-stack
applications


"Motivated CSE fresher with strong full-stack development skills, proficient in React.js, Node.js, JavaScript, Python, MySQL and REST APIs — eager to contribute to software development and client delivery."

I specialize in building end-to-end web applications — from pixel-perfect React frontends to robust Node.js/Express.js backends with MySQL and MongoDB databases.

I follow SDLC and Agile methodologies and have hands-on project experience deploying full CRUD REST APIs and responsive UI systems. I hold a Palo Alto Cybersecurity Virtual Internship certification and multiple web development certifications.

Strengths: Team Player · Quick Learner · Adaptable · Attention to Detail · Proactive · Strong Communication

My Projects

Employee Management System
View on GitHub →
React.js Node.js Express.js MySQL REST API CRUD
Employee Management System

Full-stack web application with React frontend and Node.js/Express.js backend for managing employee records. Features RESTful APIs with full CRUD operations, relational MySQL schema supporting employee hierarchy, attendance tracking, payroll data — plus search, filter, and pagination.

Food Munch — Web Application
